name: cartoon
install_doc: uv tool install cartoon  # or: pipx install cartoon  # or: npm install -g cartoon-wrap  # or: cargo install cartoon
notes: Hook + proxy mechanism. PreToolUse hook rewrites matching Bash/run_in_terminal calls to prepend 'cartoon', which compacts noisy dev-loop output (test runners, linters, builds) into TOON format before it reaches the agent. Cache-safe: compacts tool OUTPUT, does not rewrite conversation history. Targets Claude Code (rewrite via updatedInput), VS Code Copilot Chat (deny+suggest), and Copilot CLI ≥1.0.24. Also ships shell shims as a belt-and-suspenders fallback for agents without hooks. Net-savings guard: if the compacted output is not smaller, emits original byte-identically. Adapters for pytest/jest/vitest/ruff/eslint/tsc/etc inject machine-readable formats (--junit-xml, --json) then re-render as compact reports. Raw archive saved to ~/.local/state/cartoon/runs/ with recovery via 'cartoon logs'.

hooks.command: command -v cartoon >/dev/null 2>&1 && cartoon hook rewrite || exit 0
